@graph.description: BPC-157 is a synthetic 15-amino-acid peptide studied mainly in animal models for gut healing, tendon and ligament repair, and inflammation modulation; human clinical trial data is essentially absent and its FDA compounding status is unresolved pending a July 2026 PCAC review.
